heading: Promotion of health and prevention of accidents
label: 8605 Promotion of health and prevention of accidents
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7205.5 U.S.C. 421e(b), .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 24(b)60 Stat. 856, (c).5 U.S.C. 421g(b), (c), .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 40(b)60 Stat. 858.5 U.S.C. 412a, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 3960 Stat. 858In subsection (a) the word “maintenance” is omitted as surplusage.

Editorial NotesIn subsection (b) the words “except the authority to prescribe regulations” are omitted, since contains no authority for the Secretary of the Navy to prescribe regulations for the administration of that section.5 U.S.C. 421e(b)

children.text: members of the naval service on active duty;
civilian officers and employees of the Department of the Navy;
members of the Coast Guard when it is operating as a service in the Navy; and
members of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration serving with the Navy.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary, to the extent he considers proper, may delegate the authority conferred by this section to any person in the Department of the Navy, with or without the authority to make successive redelegations.
